description: Write a Rust struct for a DHT routing table entry with fields: node_id, ip_address, port, last_seen_unix. Save to routing_table.rs.
expected_output: A confirmation that routing_table.rs has been created with the correct Rust struct.

description: Write a Rust enum for message types in the P2P protocol: Handshake, Data, Ack, Disconnect. Save to message_types.rs.
expected_output: A confirmation that message_types.rs has been created with the correct Rust enum.
